title: bollea pulvinaris
intro: Bollea pulvinaris, also known as the cushion moss, is a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Andreaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Bollea pulvinaris is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Bollea pulvinaris include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
